creator: panjie@arraynetworks.com.cn
text:
hi，I encounter a issue about kevent, I register a timer event(EVFILT_TIMER) in kevent with timeout 500ms, but it is not very precise, kevent() often return after more than 500ms, sometimes even more than 1 second, is it a known issue on FreeBSD 7.0?

Please help, thanks.

FYI:

SQ3-2F-APV8600-YW-external-01# uname -a
FreeBSD SQ3-2F-APV8600-YW-external-01 7.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE #0: Mon Mar 13 17:38:00 CST 2017   amd64
